prompt: My client wants to roll their 401k into an IRA with us. We're a dual-registrant — I handle some accounts as a broker and some as an adviser. Which standard of care applies to this rollover recommendation, and what documentation do I need to keep? The account is about $340K and they're 58 years old.

assertions.text: Cites the four Reg BI obligations
Mentions PTE 2020-02 or DOL prohibited transaction exemption
Does not incorrectly apply pure fiduciary standard without acknowledging BD capacity
